settings.heading: Changing the way humans experience activewear
settings.press_label: YOU MIGHT HAVE SEEN US AT:

settings.heading: Products in motion.
settings.copy: ZODA is built for training, recovery, and every hour between. Step into the circuit and move with intent.

settings.heading: Relentless Pursuit
settings.copy: Early starts. Extra laps. Final reps.

settings.title: Technology
settings.copy: Engineered fabrics, body-mapped fit, and strategic construction help manage sweat, stretch, chafe, and support when training intensity rises.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.copy: We prioritize responsible fibers such as recycled polyester, regenerated nylon, and certified cotton so performance does not come at the planet's expense.

settings.title: Community
settings.copy: ZODA is built for athletes who show up, share standards, and push each other past the easy rep, the safe pace, and the old limit.

settings.heading: Three Pillars.
settings.copy: Performance gear should work harder than ordinary activewear: move with the body, respect the planet, and connect athletes who train with purpose.
Compression, tanks, bras, shorts, and support layers built to stay locked in during high-output training.
settings.kit_items:
Compression top
Training bra
Run short
Support layer

settings.copy: Lightweight breathable pieces for heat, humidity, distance, and race-day effort without extra drag.
settings.kit_items:

settings.copy: Clean everyday performance wear for travel, studio, recovery, and off-duty movement.
settings.kit_items:

settings.copy: Headbands, sweatbands, scrunchies, and small essentials made to finish the session.

settings.heading: Shop by collection.
settings.copy: Shop by training mode: performance staples, endurance gear, 24/7 wear, and accessories that finish the session.

settings.name: ZENCOT
settings.copy: BCI cotton and elastane for soft, breathable performance.

settings.name: Zoenix
settings.copy: Recycled polyester engineered for humidity and sweat movement.

settings.name: ZoenixLite
settings.copy: Lightweight stretch for fast, breathable movement.

settings.name: RPSTRNG
settings.copy: Regenerated nylon blend built for durable training.

settings.name: AuraForm
settings.copy: Premium support, sculpted fit, and recovery stretch.

settings.name: NyCurv
settings.copy: High-denier nylon for durability and shape recovery.

settings.name: NyX
settings.copy: Lightweight support for demanding workouts.

settings.name: NyXlite
settings.copy: Breathable recycled stretch for everyday movement.

settings.heading: Fabric system.
settings.copy: Eight fabric systems tuned for sweat control, stretch, breathability, support, and recovery.

settings.title: Zenflex
settings.summary: Compression-specific stretch and support engineered for locked-in movement without restricting the body.
settings.details:
Helps the garment contour to the body while maintaining comfort under pressure.
Built for athletes who need compression that supports effort without restricting motion.

settings.title: ZO-Vent + Unbound
settings.summary: Airflow, cooling, and unrestricted mobility for high-intensity work under pressure.
settings.details:
Breathable performance fabric supports unrestricted mobility and all-day comfort.
Built to keep athletes light, cool, and focused under pressure.

settings.title: ZO-Dry + SwiftWick
settings.summary: Fast sweat movement that keeps athletes dry, cool, and distraction-free.
settings.details:
Keeps you dry, cool, and comfortable through demanding training sessions.
Designed for distraction-free performance at every level.

settings.title: ZO-Fresh + Unconquered
settings.summary: Antimicrobial fabric technology for long-lasting freshness during extended wear.
settings.details:
Delivers long-lasting freshness and confidence during extended wear.
Made to keep athletes focused, fresh, and ready for every challenge.

settings.title: FluidMotion
settings.summary: Multi-directional stretch that moves naturally with the body for unrestricted performance.
settings.details:
Enhances flexibility, mobility, and unrestricted performance in motion.
Created for comfort-driven movement without limitations.

settings.heading: Inside Zenith Tech.
settings.copy: ZODA's precision-engineered innovation platform combines advanced fabric technology with meticulous design to push boundaries, elevate comfort, and unlock peak potential.

settings.title: Training releases
settings.copy: New kits, fabric updates, and session-ready pieces built around how athletes actually move.

settings.quote: The shorts stay locked in during strength work, but they do not feel heavy after the session.
settings.name: Amelia Tan

settings.quote: The fabric dries fast after humid runs, then still looks sharp enough to wear after training.
settings.name: Marcus Lee

settings.quote: The support feels secure without digging in. It moves with me through lifting and recovery.
settings.name: Sarah K.

settings.quote: The fabric holds its shape after repeated wear, washing, and long movement blocks.
settings.name: Daniel K.
